overview: The Village of Weston Tourism Commission held its first meeting after reorganization, electing new officers and approving a $5,000 grant for the Taste and Glow Balloonfest. The commission learned that a competing balloon event in Marshfield was canceled, potentially increasing attendance at the Weston event.

agenda.item: Call to order and Pledge of Allegiance
Work product transmittals, educational presentations and reports
New business - Grant request: Taste and Glow Balloonfest
Remarks from staff and commission members

discussions.body: Trustee Erling was nominated and elected as Chair unanimously. Cushing was nominated and elected as Vice Chair with Jackson providing the second. Renee was nominated and elected as Secretary. All elections passed unanimously with no opposition.
The minutes from the April 21st meeting were approved. Motion was seconded by Renee and passed unanimously.

discussions.item: Grant request: Taste and Glow Balloonfest
discussions.body: Brandon Jill from 3308 Green Pastures Lane presented the grant request. He reported approximately 11,000-12,000 attendees last year and announced that a competing Marshfield balloon event was canceled due to permit issues, making Taste and Glow the sole hot air balloon event in the area. Commissioner Hodal questioned room tracking, noting the application showed 20 fewer rooms than last year when they received $5,000. The commission approved a $5,000 grant matching last year's amount, with Jackson seconding. Motion passed unanimously. The commission requested better hotel room tracking data for future reports.

Renee reported attending the Alice in Dairyland dinner at Red Rock Orchard in Edgar with Jamie. She met the candidates and noted that Anastasia, who sat at their table, won the title. This was the first time the event was hosted in Marathon County since the 1970s. The candidates were from various Wisconsin universities and were impressed with Marathon County's community.

actionItems: Approved $5,000 grant to Taste and Glow Balloonfest for their annual event
Taste and Glow organizers to provide accurate hotel room usage data in their post-event report
Next meeting scheduled for July 20th at 4:00 PM (tentative)
title: Tourism Commission
